expectations.evidence: Response creates files under src/i18n/ including config.ts, context.tsx, useTranslation.ts, locales/id.json, locales/en.json, and a barrel export index.ts
Code includes: export const defaultLanguage: Language = 'id'

expectations.text: Response creates locale JSON files for id and en
expectations.evidence: Response includes src/i18n/locales/id.json and src/i18n/locales/en.json with translation keys for nav, home, about, contact, footer

expectations.text: Response implements useTranslation hook with dotted key paths
expectations.evidence: The useTranslation hook splits key by '.' and traverses: const keys = key.split('.'); for (const k of keys) { value = value[k] }. Usage shows t('home.title') and t('contact.form.name')

expectations.text: Response creates LanguageProvider with React context
expectations.evidence: src/i18n/context.tsx creates I18nContext with createContext and exports I18nProvider component that wraps children with I18nContext.Provider, managing language, setLanguage, and translations
